caption: A man with glasses, wearing a white shirt, a red neckerchief, and a black embroidered vest, stands before a microphone and speaks. He is positioned in front of a wall of light-brown horizontal blinds. Several people are seated in the foreground with their backs to the camera, including women with blonde, brown, and white hair. One woman in the foreground wears a purple garment. A guitar is partially visible behind the man. The text "ORCA" appears in white capital letters on a small white rectangular background on the right side of the scene. As the sequence progresses, the man remains in a similar position, though his facial expressions and mouth movements change as he continues to speak into the microphone. The seated audience remains still throughout the frames.
